meta.name: Neighborhood analysis (cellular neighborhoods)
meta.description: Find recurring tissue neighborhoods (niches) by clustering each cell's local cell-type composition, writing a neighborhood label per cell to obs[neighborhood_key], and plot the neighborhood map + composition.
meta.provenance: Cellular neighborhoods (Schurch et al., Cell 2020). Step 4 of the Xenium region-analysis workflow.

readme: Step 4 of the workflow (run 'Assign cell-type labels (CellTypist)' first, or use any cell-type/cluster column). For each cell, counts the cell types among its spatial neighbours and clusters those composition vectors into `n_neighborhoods` recurring niches, written to `obs[neighborhood_key]`. The plot shows the spatial neighborhood map, a cell-type × neighborhood enrichment heatmap, and the per-neighborhood composition. Needs `obsm['spatial']`. Follow with the by-region recipes (5 and 6).

params.name: cell_type_key
params.tooltip: cell-type/cluster column whose local composition defines the neighborhoods

params.name: n_neighborhoods
params.tooltip: number of recurring neighborhoods (niches) to find

params.name: neighborhood_key
params.tooltip: obs column to write the neighborhood label into
